title: suregada rubra
intro: Suregada rubra, also known as the red corkwood, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Suregada rubra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
